title: Amazon Comprehend Entity
description: Schema for an Amazon Comprehend entity detection result, representing named entities identified in text through NLP analysis.

Entities.description: A collection of entities identified in the input text.

Sentiment.description: The inferred sentiment detected in the input text.

SentimentScore.description: The confidence scores for each sentiment type.

KeyPhrases.description: A collection of key phrases identified in the input text.

Languages.description: The languages detected in the input text.

Entity.description: A named entity identified in the text.

Score.description: The level of confidence that Comprehend has in the accuracy of the detection.

BeginOffset.description: The zero-based offset in the input text where the entity begins.

EndOffset.description: The zero-based offset in the input text after the entity ends.

KeyPhrase.description: A key phrase detected in the text.

Text.description: The text of the key phrase.

DominantLanguage.description: A language detected in the text.

LanguageCode.description: The RFC 5646 language code for the dominant language.

Score.description: The confidence score for the detected language.
